home.headline: Discover your DAR
home.subhead: Enter your date of birth and receive a message about your nature, your power, and your path

dar.read_in_book: Read about your DAR in the Book of DARs
dar.read_in_book_sub: Full description, practices, meditations and safety techniques for every DAR
dar.share_card: Create a card for social media
dar.want_deeper: Want to go deeper? The Book of DARs has the full description of all 64 DARs

profile.title: Personal Cabinet
profile.fill_hint: You can change name, gender, time and place of birth at any moment
profile.referral_hint: Your friend's DAR will be unlocked in the Treasury, or you'll get crystals.
profile.hall_of_fame_empty: Play the trainer and become the Mage of the Day!
profile.language_hint: AI message will be generated in the selected language.

daily.research_sub: Help science: take a 28-statement survey (about 7 min) and become part of the first scientific study of DARs in Dubai
daily.intuition_sub: Guess the DAR and develop your inner sense
daily.feedback_sub_short: Found a bug? Have an idea? Write to us!

diary.title: DAR Diary
diary.question: How do you feel right now?

games.hub_sub: Choose a game and develop your intuition
games.intuition_desc: Guess the DAR among cards. Classic, multi-search, solo or battle with the AI dragon Yupik
games.atlantis_desc: Card battle of Magic, Life, Power and Might. You against an AI opponent and the Higher Powers
games.battles_desc: Challenge a friend, battle in real time and reach the Hall of Fame

treasury.empty_hint: Calculate your DAR to start your collection of 64 DARs!
treasury.quest_count_error: Could not count the quest. Check your connection and try again.
treasury.meditation_count_error: Could not count the meditation. Check your connection and try again.

oracle.next_available: Let the message unfold in your life. The new one will be available in {time}.
oracle.wisdom_slow: Wisdom unfolds slowly — come back tomorrow
oracle.read_in_book: Read in the Book of DARs
oracle.query_hint: What question troubles you? Which energies will help you find the answer?
oracle.tap_card_hint: Tap a card to draw a hint
oracle.calc_first_sub: To get your personal DAR of the Day, you need to know your DAR by birth date

book.chapter_locked: This chapter is available in the full version. Enter a promo code below to unlock the whole book.
book.confirm_clear_bookmarks: Remove all bookmarks? This action cannot be undone.
book.full_access_unlocked: Full access to the book is unlocked!
book.promo_activation_failed: Could not activate the promo code

kb.access_sub: Enter a promo code to unlock the encyclopedia of all 64 DARs and 9 Fields

feedback.title: FEEDBACK
feedback.text_placeholder: Describe the issue or your idea...

rel.title: ADD A CLOSE ONE
rel.warning: ⚠️ Note: once you save this person, you cannot edit or delete them. This protects against impersonation and abuse. Please check the data before saving.
rel.intro: Fill in the data of your close one to calculate their DAR.

psu.title: YOUR PATH BEGINS
psu.birthdate_hint: Same date you used when calculating your DAR. If wrong — fix it here.
psu.birthtime_hint: If you don't know the exact time, use 12:00
psu.accuracy_warning: ⚠️ For accurate and deep readings, all data must be real. Made-up name, time or place of birth will lead to messages that don't fit you.

tariffs.promo_first_month: 🎁 First month of any plan with −{percent}% off
tariffs.book_desc: Full Book of DARs with all 94 chapters + designer PDF. Forever, no subscription.
tariffs.book_note: Opens only the Book content. Does not affect plan or its limits.
tariffs.footnote: The subscription does not renew automatically. When the period ends, your access returns to «Wanderer», but all your data is kept.
tariffs.free_for_all: Available to everyone, no payment needed
tariffs.email_prompt: Enter your email for the YooKassa receipt:

limits.oracle_locked_msg: On the free plan you have 1 prediction per day. Get Guardian — 3 per day. Or Master — unlimited.
limits.compatibility_locked_msg: Your free check is already used. Guardian gives 5 per month, Master — unlimited.
limits.hero_journey_locked_title: The Hero's Path is still closed
limits.hero_journey_locked_msg: You can open this Path: invite a friend with this DAR (you'll get a preview for free), buy for 300 crystals / 50 Stars / $0.99, or get Master — they have all 64 DARs unlocked.
limits.footer_note: You can cancel the subscription at any moment
